creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
By the by I just want to clarify one more thing that is this specific issue is actually for ports consumers only. If you try to build the ports in poudriere and use those that will be perfectly fine.

Just make sure that you have the following lines in your make.conf:

WITH_MPM=event
OPTIONS_SET+=ZTS

And although I am not sure but this problem often occurs when you are upgrading the ports. Someone told me that if you do clean install like when there are no php ports installed it works fine.

If you need more information regarding poudriere setup feel free to make the noise to my inbox.
